summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUDOaqui SuperApp with SEED DATA. All 8 modules tested: Login, Dashboard, Eventos (5 events), Marketplace (8 products, 5 categories), Alojamento (4 properties), Turismo (4 experiences), Imobiliario (5 properties, 1 agent), Entregas (estimate form), Restaurantes (3 restaurants with menus and cart). All features working correctly.

issues: React Router v7 future flag warnings in console - minor, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API client correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
Error handling is implemented on all API calls
Loading states are shown during API calls
Seed data is properly displayed on all module pages
Create forms open correctly (403 expected for cliente role - correct behavior)
Cart functionality in restaurant detail works with local state
OTP login flow works correctly with database-stored OTPs (SMS sandbox mode)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, seed data displayed, forms work, cart works

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -t -A -d tudoaqui -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='+244923456789' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

seed_data_verification.events: 5 events displayed (Noite de Semba e Kizomba, Festival Internacional de Musica, Expo Angola Tech, Feira do Livro, Maratona de Luanda)
seed_data_verification.marketplace_products: 8 products displayed (Camisa Wax Africana, Colar de Missangas, Smartphone Xiaomi, etc.)
seed_data_verification.alojamento_properties: 4 properties displayed (Villa Tropical, Apartamento Vista Mar, Casa de Praia, Quarto Acolhedor)
seed_data_verification.turismo_experiences: 4 experiences displayed (Workshop Culinaria, Tour Luanda, Passeio de Barco, Safari Kissama)
seed_data_verification.realestate_agents: 1 agent displayed (Sofia Neto) in Agentes tab
seed_data_verification.restaurants: 3 restaurants displayed (Muamba da Mama, Sushi Lounge Luanda, Burger Republic)
seed_data_verification.restaurant_menu: 10 menu items with categories (Pratos Principais, Acompanhamentos, Bebidas)

features_tested.login_page: ✓ TUDOAqui branding with red T logo and yellow 'Aqui'
features_tested.login_slogan: ✓ 'a sua vida em um so lugar' displayed
features_tested.otp_flow: ✓ Phone input -> Send OTP -> OTP form -> Verify -> Dashboard redirect
features_tested.dashboard: ✓ Welcome banner, stats (Online, cliente, 8 services), 8 module cards
features_tested.events_page: ✓ 5 events from seed data, search works, create modal opens
features_tested.marketplace_page: ✓ 8 products, 5 category chips, search works, create modal opens
features_tested.alojamento_page: ✓ 4 properties with price/night, search works, create modal opens
features_tested.turismo_page: ✓ 4 experiences with price and duration, search works, create modal opens
features_tested.imoveis_page: ✓ 5 properties in Imoveis tab, 1 agent in Agentes tab, tabs work
features_tested.entregas_page: ✓ 2 tabs (Minhas entregas/Estimar preco), estimate form returns result
features_tested.restaurantes_page: ✓ 3 restaurants displayed with ratings and categories
features_tested.restaurant_detail: ✓ Menu with categories and items, add-to-cart buttons work
features_tested.restaurant_cart: ✓ Cart summary bar shows item count and total price
features_tested.logout: ✓ Logout clears tokens and redirects to login

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly with seed data. PostgreSQL is running. SMS is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs stored in DB. Rate limiter may cause delays if testing rapidly. Create forms will return 403 for cliente role (expected behavior - requires organizador/vendedor/anfitriao roles).

mocked_apis.sms_provider: Africa's Talking is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table instead of being sent via real SMS
